Google Pixel 10 Pro gets a surprising new feature

Jesse Hollander

The latest Pixel 10 Pro software update brings a feature that Pixel users have been requesting for years.

What's new in the update

Google has finally added native support for multiple home screen layouts, allowing users to customize their Pixel experience like never before.

This is exactly what we needed to make our Pixel devices truly stand out.
